question: Why did first-year STEM retention drop 3.8 points for first-gen students in the engineering school, while liberal-arts held?
metric_label: Retention by school, student persona, and term

upstream_models.description: Banner SIS enrollment spine conformed by Fivetran CDC. Carries school, major, credit_load, and enrollment_status flags for every student-term combination.
Term GPA, DFW rates by course, and cumulative standing. Sourced from Banner grade tables via Fivetran. Joins to enrollment spine on student_id and term.
Conformed student profile from Banner and Workday. Carries first_gen_indicator, pell_eligible, home_zip, and demographic attributes used for equity segment disaggregation.
Canvas LMS plus Banner section master. Carries section meeting_day, meeting_time, instructor_id, and enrollment capacity. The Wednesday-evening section time signal lives here.
